name: Sirilion 'Greyhound'

aspects.high_concept: The Hound of Chorrol, Winter Tracker With a Trained Hound
aspects.trouble: His Hound Is a Weak Point (and a Tell)

stunts: Scent Mark: +2 to Survival when Creating Advantage to mark a target's trail (blood, cloth, ash).
Snareline: +2 to Survival when Creating Advantage with traps in wilderness terrain.
Hound Handler: Once per scene, gain +2 to Notice when the hound is present and searching.
notes: This is the first hunter that feels scary in the wilderness. If Wayn treats the hound with mercy, it becomes a leverage point.
combat_tactics: Starts at range, uses traps to control zones, forces exhausting movement, then closes only when advantage is stacked.
gm_notes: Don't overuse him. Make the approach tense: signs, silence, then a snap of cord or an arrow in a tree.
